textByHashes.82f5889458849daf7926e1c0c4eab9a603b72fee: I buy silk. If you ever want to sell any silk, bring it here.
textByHashes.7927d8b84959e2b75379cf9dce952e66daf5888e: Well I'll need to up my prices. A lot of people won't be happy about this.
textByHashes.e6c00c9dfc218cf13b3967716b8a097a4cc3b42b: The king wouldn't send a mourner to tell me this. Go away!
textByHashes.1472e53636d03025829a270e74325b43f7901771: The king wouldn't send a citizen to tell me this. Go away!
textByHashes.d14f79a3c80bc4d790fbd17dc94c747b80f36bed: Nilsal. Looking to buy some fine silks?
textByHashes.53f4058c6db1d56d83972f934155440b427d40e7: You're missing out, but suit yourself.
textByHashes.ea3095e0fd1b2d94a8c6aec869785fdfef7b3845: You're the one who stole from me! Guards! Guards!
textByHashes.b9cff7ef22f5bb045450bfbc7498cff9e85e52bd: Ah I may be interested in that. What sort of price were you looking at per piece of silk?
textByHashes.1b5d60f9d984651d8f44316babf77af78745f7fd: 80 coins? That's a bit steep! How about 40 coins?
textByHashes.0955e7d246b08a3e481874a389a6adfafe957853: You'll never get that much for it. I'll be generous and give you 50 for it.
textByHashes.309013cdcc6a9024d6865edd83f3e72eefd7c2d9: You drive a hard bargain, but I guess that will have to do.
textByHashes.b5236610af8760ed8039eae2335b72264b31730c: Don't be ridiculous! That is far too much. You insult me with that price.
